lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਸਹਜ ਸੁਖੁ ਨਉ ਨਿਧਿ ॥
lines.translit: naam nidhaan sehaj sukh nau nidh |
lines.english: are found in the treasure of the Naam, which brings celestial peace and poise, and the nine treasures.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਾਰਿ ਪਦਾਰਥ ਅਸਟ ਦਸਾ ਸਿਧਿ ॥
lines.translit: chaar padaarath asatt dasaa sidh |
lines.english: The four great blessings, and the eighteen miraculous spiritual powers,

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧਸੰਗਿ ਭਜੁ ਅਚੁਤ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਦਰਗਹ ਸੋਭਾ ਪਾਵਣਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: saadhasang bhaj achut suaamee daragah sobhaa paavanaa |3|
lines.english: In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, meditate and vibrate upon your imperishable Lord and Master, and you shall be honored in the Court of the Lord. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਬ ਕਲਿਆਣ ਜੇ ਮਨ ਮਹਿ ਚਾਹਹਿ ਮਿਲਿ ਸਾਧੂ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਰਾਵਣਾ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: sarab kaliaan je man meh chaaheh mil saadhoo suaamee raavanaa |4|
lines.english: If you yearn in your mind for all joys, then join the Saadh Sangat, and dwell upon your Lord and Master. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮੁ ਪਦਾਰਥੁ ਜੀਤੁ ਪਰਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: janam padaarath jeet paraanee |
lines.english: that the mortal must be victorious in this priceless human life.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਸਤ ਸਿੰਮ੍ਰਿਤਿ ਬੇਦ ਵਖਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: saasat sinmrit bed vakhaanee |
lines.english: The Shaastras, the Simritees and the Vedas proclaim

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮੁ ਕ੍ਰੋਧੁ ਨਿੰਦਾ ਪਰਹਰੀਐ ਹਰਿ ਰਸਨਾ ਨਾਨਕ ਗਾਵਣਾ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: kaam krodh nindaa parahareeai har rasanaa naanak gaavanaa |5|
lines.english: Forsaking sexual desire, anger and slander, sing of the Lord with your tongue, O Nanak. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਜੋ ਜਪੈ ਸੋਈ ਵਡਭਾਗੀ ਬਹੁੜਿ ਨ ਜੋਨੀ ਪਾਵਣਾ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: jo jo japai soee vaddabhaagee bahurr na jonee paavanaa |6|
lines.english: Whoever meditates on Him is very fortunate; he is not consigned to reincarnation again. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਰੂਪੁ ਨ ਰੇਖਿਆ ਕੁਲੁ ਨਹੀ ਜਾਤੀ ॥
lines.translit: jis roop na rekhiaa kul nahee jaatee |
lines.english: He has no form or shape, no ancestry or social class.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰਨ ਪੂਰਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਤੀ ॥
lines.translit: pooran poor rahiaa din raatee |
lines.english: The Perfect Lord is perfectly pervading day and night.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਲਤਾ ਫਿਰੈ ਰਹੈ ਨਿਤ ਤਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: jalataa firai rahai nit taataa |
lines.english: wanders around burning, and remains tormented.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਬਿਸਰੈ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਬਿਧਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: jis no bisarai purakh bidhaataa |
lines.english: One who forgets the Primal Lord, the Architect of karma,

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਕਿਰਤਘਣੈ ਕਉ ਰਖੈ ਨ ਕੋਈ ਨਰਕ ਘੋਰ ਮਹਿ ਪਾਵਣਾ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: akirataghanai kau rakhai na koee narak ghor meh paavanaa |7|
lines.english: No one can save such an ungrateful person; he is thrown into the most horrible hell. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਉ ਪ੍ਰਾਣ ਤਨੁ ਧਨੁ ਜਿਨਿ ਸਾਜਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: jeeo praan tan dhan jin saajiaa |
lines.english: He blessed you with your soul, the breath of life, your body and wealth;

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸ ਸਿਉ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਛਾਡਿ ਅਨ ਰਾਤਾ ਕਾਹੂ ਸਿਰੈ ਨ ਲਾਵਣਾ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: tis siau preet chhaadd an raataa kaahoo sirai na laavanaa |8|
lines.english: Forsaking His Love, you are imbued with another; you shall never achieve your goals like this. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਤ ਗਰਭ ਮਹਿ ਰਾਖਿ ਨਿਵਾਜਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: maat garabh meh raakh nivaajiaa |
lines.english: He preserved and nurtured you in your mother's womb.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਾਥਿ ਹਮਾਰੈ ਕਛੂਐ ਨਾਹੀ ਜਿਸੁ ਜਣਾਇਹਿ ਤਿਸੈ ਜਣਾਵਣਾ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: haath hamaarai kachhooai naahee jis janaaeihi tisai janaavanaa |9|
lines.english: Nothing is in my hands; he alone knows, whom You inspire to know. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਵਸਹਿ ਸਭਨ ਕੈ ਨੇਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: ghatt ghatt vaseh sabhan kai nere |
lines.english: You dwell in each and every heart, and are near everyone.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਾਰਿ ਅਨੁਗ੍ਰਹੁ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਮੇਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: dhaar anugrahu suaamee mere |
lines.english: Please shower me with Your Merciful Grace, O my Lord and Master.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸ ਹੀ ਪੁਰਖ ਨ ਵਿਆਪੈ ਮਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: tis hee purakh na viaapai maaeaa |
lines.english: that person is not afflicted by Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੈ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਧੁਰਿ ਲਿਖਿ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kai masatak dhur likh paaeaa |
lines.english: One who has such pre-ordained destiny inscribed upon his forehead,

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਗਿਆ ਦੂਖ ਸੂਖ ਸਭਿ ਕੀਨੇ ॥
lines.translit: aagiaa dookh sookh sabh keene |
lines.english: In His Will, He made all pain and pleasure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਦਾਸ ਸਦਾ ਸਰਣਾਈ ਦੂਸਰ ਲਵੈ ਨ ਲਾਵਣਾ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: naanak daas sadaa saranaaee doosar lavai na laavanaa |10|
lines.english: Slave Nanak seeks Your Sanctuary forever; there is no other equal to You. ||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਨਾਮੁ ਬਿਰਲੈ ਹੀ ਚੀਨੇ ॥
lines.translit: amrit naam biralai hee cheene |
lines.english: How rare are those who remember the Ambrosial Naam, the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਕੀ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਕਹਣੁ ਨ ਜਾਈ ਜਤ ਕਤ ਓਹੀ ਸਮਾਵਣਾ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: taa kee keemat kehan na jaaee jat kat ohee samaavanaa |11|
lines.english: His value cannot be described. He is prevailing everywhere. ||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਲ ਸਹਾਈ ਸੋਈ ਤੇਰਾ ਜੋ ਤੇਰੈ ਮਨਿ ਭਾਵਣਾ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: baal sahaaee soee teraa jo terai man bhaavanaa |12|
lines.english: He is your help and support, since infancy; He fulfills your mind's desires. ||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਈ ਪੂਰਨ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਬਿਧਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: soee pooran purakh bidhaataa |
lines.english: He is the Perfect Primal Lord, the Architect of karma.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਈ ਭਗਤੁ ਸੋਈ ਵਡ ਦਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: soee bhagat soee vadd daataa |
lines.english: He is the devotee; He is the Great Giver.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਲੁ ਨਹੀ ਬਧਹਿ ਘਟਹਿ ਨ ਘਟਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: til nahee badheh ghatteh na ghattaae |
lines.english: They do not increase or decrease by anyone's efforts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਰਤੁ ਦੂਖ ਸੂਖ ਲਿਖਿ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: mirat dookh sookh likh paae |
lines.english: Death, pain and pleasure are ordained by the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਈ ਹੋਇ ਜਿ ਕਰਤੇ ਭਾਵੈ ਕਹਿ ਕੈ ਆਪੁ ਵਞਾਵਣਾ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: soee hoe ji karate bhaavai keh kai aap vayaavanaa |13|
lines.english: That alone happens, which is pleasing to the Creator; speaking of himself, the mortal ruins himself. ||13||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮ ਜਨਮ ਕੇ ਟੂਟੇ ਗਾਂਢੇ ॥
lines.translit: janam janam ke ttootte gaandte |
lines.english: He unites with Himself, those who were separated for so many incarnations.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਧ ਕੂਪ ਤੇ ਸੇਈ ਕਾਢੇ ॥
lines.translit: andh koop te seee kaadte |
lines.english: He lifts us up and pulls us out of the deep dark pit;

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਰਪਾ ਧਾਰਿ ਰਖੇ ਕਰਿ ਅਪੁਨੇ ਮਿਲਿ ਸਾਧੂ ਗੋਬਿੰਦੁ ਧਿਆਵਣਾ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: kirapaa dhaar rakhe kar apune mil saadhoo gobind dhiaavanaa |14|
lines.english: Showering them with His Mercy, He protects them with His own hands. Meeting with the Holy Saints, they meditate on the Lord of the Universe. ||14||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰੀ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਕਹਣੁ ਨ ਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: teree keemat kehan na jaaee |
lines.english: Your worth cannot be described.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਚਰਜ ਰੂਪੁ ਵਡੀ ਵਡਿਆਈ ॥
lines.translit: acharaj roop vaddee vaddiaaee |
lines.english: Wondrous is Your form, and Your glorious greatness.

lines.translit: bhagat daan mangai jan teraa naanak bal bal jaavanaa |15|1|14|22|24|2|14|62|
lines.english: Your humble servant begs for the gift of devotional worship. Nanak is a sacrifice, a sacrifice to You. ||15||1||14||22||24||2||14||62||

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਰੂ ਵਾਰ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: maaroo vaar mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Vaar Of Maaroo, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Salok, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਣੁ ਗਾਹਕ ਗੁਣੁ ਵੇਚੀਐ ਤਉ ਗੁਣੁ ਸਹਘੋ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: vin gaahak gun vecheeai tau gun sahagho jaae |
lines.english: If virtue is sold when there is no buyer, then it is sold very cheap.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣ ਕਾ ਗਾਹਕੁ ਜੇ ਮਿਲੈ ਤਉ ਗੁਣੁ ਲਾਖ ਵਿਕਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: gun kaa gaahak je milai tau gun laakh vikaae |
lines.english: But if one meets a buyer of virtue, then virtue sells for hundreds of thousands.
